title: Support bidirectional arrays as module ports

features.name: unpacked array as inout port
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declared as an inout (bidirectional) port on a module

features.name: generate loop with module instantiation using array element
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that instantiates modules while passing unpacked array elements as inout ports
features.snippet: generate for (genvar i = 0; i < 5; i++) begin : g inst u_mod(foo[i]); end endgenerate
